creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Andres Montalban from comment #0)

Hi, 

I formally requested to MFH libgcrypt 1.8.1 to the quarterly branch, but I have not received the approval of any member of the ports-secteam.

Note that security updates for non-broken ports require approval.

This is why the update is not yet available in the quarterly branch (2017Q3).
